name: review-for-ship
description: User-invoked skill to run a comprehensive pre-ship review using all review agents relevant to the project's tech stack, with rad-code-review as the final gate. Reads the stack profile and dispatches specialist agents in parallel, then runs rad-code-review for AI slop detection, architecture, security, and release readiness. Trigger when the user says "/review-for-ship", "review before shipping", "is this ready to deploy", "pre-ship review", "run all reviews", "comprehensive review", "final check before shipping", "production readiness check", "is this ready to merge", "ship check", "pre-deploy review", "audit everything".
